config.title: SBOM Vulnerability Scanner
config.outputDirectory.description: Output directory (relative to workspace root) for generated SBOM and vulnerability reports.
config.vulnerabilityScanner.description: Scanner selection for vulnerability checks. auto tries Trivy first, then npm audit.
config.sbomGenerator.description: SBOM generator selection. auto tries Syft first, then Trivy, then the built-in manifest parser.
config.uiLanguage.description: UI language for dashboard and notifications. auto follows VS Code language.
config.resultOpenMode.description: How generated reports open: inside VS Code or in an external browser.
